emails.subject: FW: Top Private Equity Law Firms
emails.body: FW: Top Private Equity Law Firms Per my voicemail message to each of you. Thanks. Lance. W. Lance Schuler Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 Phone: 713/853-5419 Fax: 281/664-4890 Email: lance.schuler-legal@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Top Private Equity Law Firms
emails.body: RE: Top Private Equity Law Firms Should we try Akin Gump? What is your recommendation off the list? Mark

emails.subject: Re: FW: Top Private Equity Law Firms
emails.body: Re: FW: Top Private Equity Law Firms Where did we come out on a cap on breakage fee? Mark Haedicke

emails.subject: RE: FW: Top Private Equity Law Firms
emails.body: RE: FW: Top Private Equity Law Firms Is there anything I need to work on tonight? What is the schedule tonight? Mark To: Haedicke, Mark E.
